summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FlowIQ Quick Expense Entry features and Transaction History functionality. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend mostly functional with one overlay issue affecting FAB button clicks.

ui_bugs.issue: Emergent badge overlay intercepting FAB button clicks
ui_bugs.details: FAB button is visible and functional, but Emergent badge overlay prevents normal clicking. Requires force=True to bypass overlay.

passed_tests: All backend APIs (9/9 tests passed - 100% success rate)
Transaction History page loads correctly with all components
Search functionality works (filters transactions by merchant/category)
Date filter chips work (All Time, This Week, This Month)
Category filter chips work (Food & Dining, Transport, Shopping, etc.)
Summary card displays Income, Expenses, and Net totals correctly
Weekly Budget widget displays with progress bar and remaining budget
Transaction rows display with proper formatting and data
Edit transaction modal opens and allows modifications
Delete confirmation modal works with proper warnings
Navigation between Dashboard and Transaction History works
FAB button is visible on all pages
Quick amount buttons and category chips are present in drawer
Frequent category indicators (green dots) display correctly
Merchant suggestions appear when category is selected

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (1 minor overlay issue with FAB button)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix FAB button overlay issue: The Emergent badge is intercepting clicks on the Quick Entry FAB button. Consider adjusting z-index or positioning to prevent click interception. All other functionality is working correctly.
